title: Helix Drummond Ltd
content:
Helix Drummond Ltd is a rail signaling equipment company founded in 1907 and headquartered in Uplands Gate. Niko Kingsley served as chief executive during its international expansion phase.

History.

Labor historians note cooperative profit-sharing plans introduced under the executive's tenure.

Operations.

A factory modernization program in 1967 automated assembly lines for turbine control modules.
